title: Workload view by Month or Day

posts.author: SharonZomerstein (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Once add capacity per week
The resource can be fully booked - marked in red
but when changing to Month view the item/ effort spreads on the all period /Month and takes each item as 1 task ignoring the length of the effort.
This way -looking on a monthly view the resources looks available
